action: Cycle 2 (predicate quality) — static ACS-predicate linter + mutation pre-flight DECLINE on grep-only predicates
operator_note: Layer 2 of the four-layer predicate-quality defense (Layer 1 = Cycle 1 author separation, shipping now at staged diff). Scope: (1) NEW scripts/verification/lint-acs-predicates.sh — reads each acs/cycle-N/*.sh, counts grep/test/[ calls vs subprocess invocations of files in the cycle's diff; FAILS if grep_only_count > 0 AND subprocess_invocation_count == 0, OR if no file in 'git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD' is referenced by the predicate. (2) NEW tests/verification/test-lint-acs-predicates.sh — 7 cycle-85 fake predicates (must FAIL) + 2 hand-written behavioral predicates (must PASS) as fixture corpus. (3) MODIFY scripts/verification/mutate-eval.sh — pre-flight returns rc=2 with DECLINE message when predicate is grep-only. (4) MODIFY scripts/lifecycle/phase-gate.sh — add gate_test_to_build hook calling the linter. (5) Add --explain flag to linter outputting human-readable verdict ('PASS: invokes subprocess on file X' / 'FAIL: only contains grep on file Y, no subprocess invocation'). GATE: linter correctly fails all 7 cycle-85 fakes and passes the 2 hand-written behavioral predicates; mutate-eval.sh returns DECLINE on grep-only fixture. Predecessor: Cycle 1 (author separation, staged on main pre-ship). Plan: see evidence_pointer.
